title: Employee Assistance Services: About us - Canada.ca
content:
## Employee Assistance Services: About us
- Employee Assistance Program
- For service providers
- Employee       Assistance Services

## Employee Assistance Services
Health Canada’s Employee Assistance Services offers  workplace wellness solutions to help federal organizations create healthy, safe  and inclusive work environments for their employees. We offer culturally competent services that meet the diverse  needs of our clients, including:
- mental health support through a 24-hour employee  assistance program (EAP)
- trauma management support and extended counselling
- organizational support after a crisis or an  incident
- wellness training and workshops
- help with resolving workplace disputes
- violence and harassment prevention support
- workplace assessments and recommendations
We understand the public service because we’re part of it  too. We have over 30 years of experience in providing tailored workplace  wellness services to support:
- federal departments and agencies
- employees and their immediate family members
We’re one of the largest employee assistance program  providers in Canada, with a team that can offer you a full suite of wellness  solutions.
We know how to respond to the ever-changing needs of  federal government departments and agencies. As part of our services, we  customize and develop programs to meet your organization’s priorities. This  includes offering simple and efficient contracting options on a cost-recovery  basis. We also understand and follow federal laws and policies related to:
- official       languages
Find more health and wellness support for federal employees
